nasb.text: These are the two olive trees and the two lampstands that stand before the Lord of the earth.

esv.text: These are the two olive trees and the two lampstands that stand before the Lord of the earth.

cnv.text: 他們就是站在全地之主面前的兩棵橄欖樹和兩個燈臺。

ccb.text: 这两位见证人就是竖立在世界之主面前的那两棵橄榄树和两座灯台。

csbs.text: 这两个人就是站在大地之主面前的那两棵橄榄树、那两座灯台。
